nodes.label: AI as planning collaborator for breaking down ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I use it mostly for planning purposes. I like to use it as I am planning. I know my big ideas, so I use AI to help me break down the ideas into smaller chunks.

nodes.label: AI-generated content quality and validity
nodes.grounding_span: When I used the questions in class, they were valid and fit well into the interactions with the students.

nodes.label: Authentic personal connection in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: When I am planning things individually for children, I want that to specifically come from me. It makes it authentic.

nodes.label: AI use for curriculum-constrained tasks
nodes.grounding_span: There are certain objectives or standards that I have to teach by and certain structures that I have to follow (i.e. writing format) that AI could improve on, but due to some restrictions with curriculum I am unable to use it for that.

nodes.label: AI as efficiency booster for planning
nodes.grounding_span: I use it consistently, as it speeds up the process for me to get all of my planning done

nodes.label: Student understanding and engagement
nodes.grounding_span: they were valid and fit well into the interactions with the students

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal connection
nodes.grounding_span: It makes it authentic. Sometimes I write small quotes or questions for the kids to think about on their own and because I know them personally, it makes it more special.

nodes.label: Professional efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: it speeds up the process for me to get all of my planning done

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI-generated questions
nodes.grounding_span: I was satisfied with the results when I added the questions AI came up with in my plans, my dean was impressed at the amount of detail that went into them.

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in personal student interactions
nodes.grounding_span: When I am planning things individually for children, I want that to specifically come from me.

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I envision the usage increasing in other ways, maybe adding in some activities or looking to use it for creative stories

nodes.label: Iterative refinement of AI prompts
nodes.grounding_span: There are many times where I may not have been clear in the structure I am looking for in the lesson, so I need to fine tune my expectations.

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: When I am planning things individually for children, I want that to specifically come from me.
